title: Elemental's Steam Engines!
description: Adds steam engines to your adventure, All aboard!
body:
Steam Engines!

This Addon includes steam engine fakemons, bringing back the golden age of steam engines. This was inspired by Steam Engines.

Currently there is only one engine in the mod more coming soon!....

DESCRIPTION:

Choo choo

Choo choo is a 4-4-4 cute steam engine and is a standard gauge steam locomotive.


UPDATE!

Chugga Choo choo has been added to the addon! , Chugga Choo choo is a 4-4-4 steam engine that is very hardworking.


UPDATE!

Mr.Chuggington has been added to the addon! , Mr.Chuggington is a 4-6-4 fast grand steam engine,
and is the coolest steam engine in town.

More will be coming soon!

By:Elemental
